name: The Unexpected Maid.
description:
❝I guess this isn't that bad.❞

• Times are tough, extra jobs are sought after, but who would have thought that Hakurei Reimu herself would be working for them as a simple full-time maid? That's certainly new. Besides, what happened to the shrine she has to take care of? That seems to have been put on the back burner...

────୨ৎ────

Art by Himajinsan

Touhou
creator: -Josue-
